html:
This article is a stub. You can help Don't Starve Wiki by expanding it.

See also: Floating Platform

The Ice Boat (or Ocean Ice) is a Floating Platform that spawns after an Ice Floe collapses. It will slowly lose health at a rate of -2 /s and drops 3 Ice once its health reaches 0 and leaves behind some visual small pieces of ice on water.

Gallery

  • Ice Boat small pieces
  • Ice Boat appears after Ice Floe collapses
